Wolf Freedom of Religion or Belief Victims List Country Profiles Defending Freedoms Project Publications " class="we-megamenu-nolink"> Annual Reports Contact Us Facebook Twitter YouTube Instagram Search Sri Lanka View the Sri Lanka chapters in our annual reports > Recent News Events Publications Advising Government Religious freedom conditions in Sri Lanka are concerning. The government enforces discriminatory legislation such as the Prevention of Terrorism Act (PTA) and the International Covenant on Civil and Political Rights (ICCPR) Act to arbitrarily detain religious minorities. Additionally, the government has coordinated with Buddhist clergy to identify and expropriate land from Hindus and Muslims in the North and East for the construction of Buddhist sites.
